// Flutter web plugin registrant file.
//
// Generated file. Do not edit.
//

// @dart = 2.13
// ignore_for_file: type=lint

import 'package:audioplayers_web/audioplayers_web.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_web/shared_preferences_web.dart';
import 'package:speech_to_text/speech_to_text_web.dart';
import 'package:flutter_web_plugins/flutter_web_plugins.dart';

void registerPlugins([final Registrar? pluginRegistrar]) {
  final Registrar registrar = pluginRegistrar ?? webPluginRegistrar;
  AudioplayersPlugin.registerWith(registrar);
  SharedPreferencesPlugin.registerWith(registrar);
  SpeechToTextPlugin.registerWith(registrar);
  registrar.registerMessageHandler();
}

FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\.dart_tool\flutter_build\dart_plugin_registrant.dart
==================================================

//
// Generated file. Do not edit.
// This file is generated from template in file `flutter_tools/lib/src/flutter_plugins.dart`.
//

// @dart = 3.9

import 'dart:io'; // flutter_ignore: dart_io_import.
import 'package:path_provider_android/path_provider_android.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_android/shared_preferences_android.dart';
import 'package:path_provider_foundation/path_provider_foundation.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_foundation/shared_preferences_foundation.dart';
import 'package:path_provider_linux/path_provider_linux.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_linux/shared_preferences_linux.dart';
import 'package:path_provider_foundation/path_provider_foundation.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_foundation/shared_preferences_foundation.dart';
import 'package:path_provider_windows/path_provider_windows.dart';
import 'package:shared_preferences_windows/shared_preferences_windows.dart';
import 'package:speech_to_text_windows/speech_to_text_windows.dart';

@pragma('vm:entry-point')
class _PluginRegistrant {

  @pragma('vm:entry-point')
  static void register() {
    if (Platform.isAndroid) {
      try {
        PathProviderAndroid.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`path_provider_android` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SharedPreferencesAndroid.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`shared_preferences_android` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

    } else if (Platform.isIOS) {
      try {
        PathProviderFoundation.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`path_provider_foundation` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SharedPreferencesFoundation.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`shared_preferences_foundation` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

    } else if (Platform.isLinux) {
      try {
        PathProviderLinux.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`path_provider_linux` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SharedPreferencesLinux.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`shared_preferences_linux` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

    } else if (Platform.isMacOS) {
      try {
        PathProviderFoundation.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`path_provider_foundation` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SharedPreferencesFoundation.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`shared_preferences_foundation` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

    } else if (Platform.isWindows) {
      try {
        PathProviderWindows.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`path_provider_windows` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SharedPreferencesWindows.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`shared_preferences_windows` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

      try {
        SpeechToTextWindows.registerWith();
      } catch (err) {
        print(
          '`speech_to_text_windows` threw an error: $err. '
          'The app may not function as expected until you remove this plugin from pubspec.yaml'
        );
      }

    }
  }
}

FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\basketball.dart

// lib/components/basketball.dart
import 'dart:math';
import 'dart:ui' as ui; // Gradient
import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

/// 援ъ쓽 ?쀫?遺꾩쓣 ?섎씪?닿퀬(?꾨옯遺遺?40%留??④?),
/// ?덈떒硫???? + 踰??먭퍡(?ㅻ젋吏 留? + ?대? ?곗깋 + ?뚯쟾 ?먯꽑(?먭퍡 ?????쒖떆.
/// 寃? ?덉꽑/臾대뒳 ?놁쓬.
class Basketball extends PositionComponent {
  double radius;
  double omega;     // ?먯꽑 ?뚯쟾 ?띾룄
  double friction;  // 媛먯냽
  double angle = 0; // ?뚯쟾 ?꾩긽

  final Color base = const Color(0xFFEB7A2D);   // ?ㅻ젋吏(?명뵾/踰쎈몢猿?
  final Color shadow = const Color(0xFFB4541E); // ?꾨옒履?洹몃뒛(蹂쇰ⅷ)
  final Color inner = Colors.white;             // ?대? ??

  Basketball({
    required Vector2 position,
    this.radius = 60,
    this.omega = 8.0,
    this.friction = 0.6,
  }) : super(position: position, size: Vector2.all(1), anchor: Anchor.center, priority: 1000);

  @override
  void update(double dt) {
    super.update(dt);
    omega = max(0, omega - friction * dt);
    angle = (angle + omega * dt) % (pi * 2);
  }

  @override
  void render(Canvas canvas) {
    final r = radius;
    final c = Offset.zero;

    // ---- ?덈떒 ?믪씠: ?꾨옒 40%留??④린湲????됰㈃ y = +0.2r
    final double yCut = r * 0.20;

    // ?덈떒 ??諛섏?由?
    final double rPlane = sqrt(max(0, r * r - yCut * yCut));

    // ?댁쭩 ?꾩뿉???대젮?ㅻ낫???쒖젏 ?????
    const double perspective = 0.56; // 0.50~0.65 議곗젅
    final double cutW = rPlane * 2;
    final double cutH = max(1, rPlane * 2 * perspective);

    // 踰??먭퍡(px)
    final double wall = max(2.0, r * 0.08);

    // ---- 1) ?섎떒 諛섍뎄(40%) 洹몃━湲?
    canvas.save();
    canvas.clipRect(Rect.fromLTRB(-r * 3, yCut, r * 3, r * 3));
    canvas.drawCircle(c, r, Paint()..color = base);

    final radialPaint = Paint()
      ..shader = ui.Gradient.radial(
        c.translate(0, r * 0.35),
        r * 1.1,
        [Colors.transparent, shadow.withOpacity(0.85)],
        [0.35, 1.0],
      );
    canvas.drawCircle(c, r, radialPaint);

    canvas.drawOval(
      Rect.fromCenter(
        center: Offset(-r * 0.35, -r * 0.45),
        width: r * 0.8,
        height: r * 0.5,
      ),
      Paint()..color = Colors.white.withOpacity(0.18),
    );
    canvas.restore();

    // ---- 2) ?덈떒 ???+ ?대?
    final Rect outerCutRect = Rect.fromCenter(center: Offset(0, yCut), width: cutW, height: cutH);
    final Rect innerCutRect = outerCutRect.deflate(wall);

    // 諛붽묑 ?덈떒 ????ㅻ젋吏) = 踰??먭퍡 諛뷀깢
    canvas.drawOval(outerCutRect, Paint()..color = base);

    // ?대? ?곗깋 + ?댁쭩 洹몃뒛
    if (innerCutRect.width > 0 && innerCutRect.height > 0) {
      canvas.drawOval(innerCutRect, Paint()..color = inner);
      final innerShade = Paint()..color = Colors.black.withOpacity(0.06);
      final Rect shadeRect = innerCutRect.translate(0, innerCutRect.height * 0.12);
      canvas.drawOval(shadeRect, innerShade);
    }

    // ?뉗? ?멸낸???듭뀡)
    canvas.drawOval(
      outerCutRect,
      Paint()
        ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
        ..strokeWidth = 1.2
        ..color = const Color(0xFF3A1E0E).withOpacity(0.20),
    );
    if (innerCutRect.width > 0 && innerCutRect.height > 0) {
      canvas.drawOval(
        innerCutRect,
        Paint()
          ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
          ..strokeWidth = 1.0
          ..color = Colors.black.withOpacity(0.10),
      );
    }

    // ---- 3) 踰??먭퍡 留곸뿉 "?뚯쟾 ?먯꽑" (?????꾨?)
    if (innerCutRect.width > 0 && innerCutRect.height > 0) {
      _drawDottedWallRim(
          canvas: canvas,
          outerRect: outerCutRect,
          innerRect: innerCutRect,
          phase: angle,        // ?뚯쟾 ?꾩긽
          dotCount: 40,        // 48~64 沅뚯옣
          onlyFrontHalf: false // ???ㅼそ源뚯? ?댁뼱吏寃?
      );
    }

    // ?꾩껜 ?멸낸???꾩＜ ?낃쾶(?듭뀡)
    canvas.drawCircle(
      c,
      r,
      Paint()
        ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
        ..strokeWidth = 1.2
        ..color = const Color(0xFF0D0D0D).withOpacity(0.10),
    );
  }

  /// 踰??먭퍡 留?以묒븰?좎쓣 ?곕씪 ?뚯쟾?섎뒗 ?먯꽑
  /// - onlyFrontHalf=false?대㈃ ?ㅼそ(?쀫컲????洹몃━?? ?ㅼそ? ?낃쾶
  void _drawDottedWallRim({
    required Canvas canvas,
    required Rect outerRect,
    required Rect innerRect,
    required double phase,
    int dotCount = 56,
    bool onlyFrontHalf = true,
  }) {
    final cx = (outerRect.left + outerRect.right) / 2;
    final cy = (outerRect.top + outerRect.bottom) / 2;

    final rx = ((outerRect.width / 2) + (innerRect.width / 2)) / 2;
    final ry = ((outerRect.height / 2) + (innerRect.height / 2)) / 2;

    final wall = (outerRect.width - innerRect.width) / 2;
    final double rDot = wall * 0.45; // 0.30~0.45

    // ?ㅼそ(?쀫컲?? 癒쇱? ?낃쾶 洹몃━湲????욎そ ?먯씠 ??뿬 ?먯뿰?ㅻ윭??寃뱀묠
    if (!onlyFrontHalf) {
      final Paint backP = Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF311B0B).withOpacity(0.30);
      for (int i = 0; i < dotCount; i++) {
        final theta = phase + (2 * pi / dotCount) * i;
        final dx = cx + rx * cos(theta);
        final dy = cy + ry * sin(theta);
        // ?붾㈃ 醫뚰몴怨꾩뿉???ㅼそ? dy <= cy (????쀬そ)
        if (dy <= cy) {
          canvas.drawCircle(Offset(dx, dy), rDot, backP);
        }
      }
    }

    // ?욎そ(?꾨옯諛섏썝) ?좊챸?섍쾶
    final Paint frontP = Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF311B0B).withOpacity(0.85);
    for (int i = 0; i < dotCount; i++) {
      final theta = phase + (2 * pi / dotCount) * i;
      final dx = cx + rx * cos(theta);
      final dy = cy + ry * sin(theta);
      if (onlyFrontHalf) {
        if (dy > cy) {
          canvas.drawCircle(Offset(dx, dy), rDot, frontP);
        }
      } else {
        // ?꾩껜瑜?洹몃━???욎そ? 吏꾪븯寃?
        if (dy > cy) {
          canvas.drawCircle(Offset(dx, dy), rDot, frontP);
        } else {
          // ?ㅼそ? ?꾩뿉???대? ?낃쾶 洹몃젮議뚯쓬
          // ?꾩슂 ???ш린?쒕룄 ??踰????낃쾶 洹몃┫ ???덉쓬.
        }
      }
    }
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\big_plate.dart
==================================================

import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'plate.dart';
import 'dart:math';
import 'dart:ui' as ui;

// big_plate.dart ?섏젙蹂?
class BigPlate extends Plate {
  BigPlate({required Vector2 center, required String imagePath})
      : super(
    center: center,
    imagePath: imagePath,
    friction: 2.8,
    // 留덉같??2.8
    maxTilt: 0.7,
    // 湲곗슱湲??꾧퀎媛?1.2
    omegaMax: 28,
    // 28 ?댁긽 鍮꾪뻾
    initialOmega: 18,
    plateSize: Vector2(180, 180),
  );

  @override
  void boost(double input) {
    // ?뵦 ?묒떆蹂대떎 ?ㅼ??댄봽??20% 鍮⑤━ 諛섏쓳 (1.2諛?
    super.boost(input * 1.2);
  }

  @override
  void update(double dt) {
    super.update(dt);
    // ?뵦 怨쇱뿴 ?쒖옉???ъ젙??(24 ?댁긽)
    final targetHeat = ((omega - 24.0) / (28.0 - 24.0)).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
    heat = ui.lerpDouble(heat, targetHeat, dt * 3.0)!;
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\bowl.dart
==================================================

import 'dart:math';
import 'dart:ui' as ui;
import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'plate.dart';

class BowlPlate extends Plate {
  late Sprite _plainBowl;
  double _dotRotation = 0.0;
  double _wobbleTime = 0.0;

  BowlPlate({required Vector2 center})
      : super(
    center: center,
    imagePath: 'components/plain_bowl.png',
    friction: 2.0,
    // 留덉같??0.8
    maxTilt: 0.8,
    // 湲곗슱湲??꾧퀎媛?0.8
    omegaMax: 35,
    // 35 ?댁긽 鍮꾪뻾
    initialOmega: 20,
    plateSize: Vector2(100, 100),
  );

  @override
  Future<void> onLoad() async {
    await super.onLoad();
    _plainBowl = await game.loadSprite('components/plain_bowl.png');
  }

  @override
  void boost(double input) {
    // ?뵦 ?묒떆蹂대떎 ?ㅼ??댄봽??20% ?먮━寃?諛섏쓳 (0.8諛?
    super.boost(input * 0.8);
  }

  @override
  void update(double dt) {
    // 1. 鍮꾪뻾 ?곹깭?쇰㈃ 遺紐?濡쒖쭅 ?섑뻾 ??醫낅즺
    if (flyingAway) {
      super.update(dt);
      return;
    }

    // 2. ?щ컻 ?꾩슜 ?뚯쟾 諛??붾뱾由??낅뜲?댄듃
    if (!falling) {
      _dotRotation += dt * (omega * 1.5);
      _dotRotation %= 2 * pi;

      // ?붾뱾由?吏꾪룺 (3~15 援ш컙)
      targetAmp = (1 - (omega - 3.0) / (15.0 - 3.0)).clamp(0, 1) * maxTilt;

      final freq = 0.5 + (omega * 0.3);
      phase += freq * dt;
      tilt = sin(phase) * targetAmp;

      // ?뵦 [?섏젙] 怨쇱뿴 ?쒓컖??援ш컙 議곗젙 (30???꾨땲??28遺??遺됱뼱吏寃?
      final targetHeat = ((omega - 28.0) / (35.0 - 28.0)).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
      heat = ui.lerpDouble(heat, targetHeat, dt * 3.0)!;
    }

    // 3. ?뵦 [以묒슂] 鍮꾪뻾 諛?臾쇰━ 濡쒖쭅???꾪빐 遺紐?update ?몄텧
    // ?대븣 plate.dart?먯꽌 ?섏젙???꾪솕??鍮꾪뻾 議곌굔???곸슜?⑸땲??
    super.update(dt);
  }

  @override
  void render(ui.Canvas canvas) {
    canvas.save();
    canvas.translate(size.x / 2, size.y / 2);
    canvas.rotate(tilt);

    _plainBowl.render(canvas, size: size, anchor: Anchor.center);

    _renderRotatingDots(canvas);

    canvas.restore();
  }

  void _renderRotatingDots(ui.Canvas canvas) {
    final paint = ui.Paint()
      ..color = const ui.Color(0xFF2C4A8D).withOpacity(0.7)
      ..style = ui.PaintingStyle.fill;

    const int dotCount = 8;
    final double radiusX = size.x * 0.44;
    final double yCenter = 0.0;

    for (int i = 0; i < dotCount; i++) {
      double currentAngle = (i * (2 * pi / dotCount)) + _dotRotation;

      double x = cos(currentAngle) * radiusX;
      double z = sin(currentAngle);

      if (z > 0) {
        double dotSize = 1.5 + (z * 1.5);

        // ??怨≪꽑 蹂댁젙 ?듭떖:
        // 以묒븰(x=0)?먯꽌 y媛믪씠 媛???ш퀬(?꾨옒), ????x=radiusX)?쇰줈 媛덉닔濡?y媛믪씠 ?묒븘吏?꾨줉(?? ?ㅼ젙
        // (1 - x?쒓낢 鍮꾩쑉)???ъ슜?섏뿬 ?꾨옒濡?蹂쇰줉??怨≪꽑??留뚮벊?덈떎.
        double curveDepth = 8.0; // 怨≪꽑??源딆씠 (?レ옄媛 ?댁닔濡???留롮씠 ?섏뼱吏?
        double curvedY = yCenter + (1 - pow(x / radiusX, 2)) * curveDepth;

        canvas.drawCircle(ui.Offset(x, curvedY), dotSize, paint);
      }
    }
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\monkey.dart
==================================================

// lib/components/monkey.dart
import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'package:flame/effects.dart';
import 'dart:math';
import '../plate_game.dart';
import 'pole.dart';
import '../sound_manager.dart';

class Monkey extends SpriteAnimationComponent
    with HasGameReference<PlateSpinGame> {
  bool isAttacking = false;
  double _timer = 0;
  final Random _rnd = Random();
  Pole? _targetPole;
  bool _hasPlayedSound = false;

  // [異붽?] ?좊땲硫붿씠???쒕젅??踰꾨쾮嫄곕┝)瑜??놁븷湲??꾪빐 誘몃━ ?댁븘??蹂?섎뱾
  late SpriteAnimation _roamingAnimation;
  late SpriteAnimation _shakeAnimation;
  late SpriteAnimation _exitAnimation;

  @override
  Future<void> onLoad() async {
    // 1. 諛고쉶 ?좊땲硫붿씠??誘몃━ 濡쒕뱶 (roaming1~3)
    final roamingSprites = await Future.wait([
      game.loadSprite('components/roaming1.png'),
      game.loadSprite('components/roaming2.png'),
      game.loadSprite('components/roaming3.png'),
    ]);
    _roamingAnimation = SpriteAnimation.spriteList(
      roamingSprites,
      stepTime: 0.15,
    );

    // 2. 怨듦꺽(?붾뱾湲? ?좊땲硫붿씠??誘몃━ 濡쒕뱶 (shake1, 2)
    final shakeSprites = await Future.wait([
      game.loadSprite('components/shake1.png'),
      game.loadSprite('components/shake2.png'),
    ]);
    _shakeAnimation = SpriteAnimation.spriteList(
      shakeSprites,
      stepTime: 0.1,
    );

    // 3. ?댁옣 ?좊땲硫붿씠??誘몃━ 濡쒕뱶 (exit1, 2)
    final exitSprites = await Future.wait([
      game.loadSprite('components/exit1.png'),
      game.loadSprite('components/exit2.png'),
    ]);
    _exitAnimation = SpriteAnimation.spriteList(
      exitSprites,
      stepTime: 0.2,
    );

    // 4. 珥덇린 ?곹깭瑜?諛고쉶(roaming) ?좊땲硫붿씠?섏쑝濡??ㅼ젙
    animation = _roamingAnimation;

    // 5. ?먯댂???ш린瑜?2諛곕줈 (湲곗〈 100 -> 200)
    size = Vector2(200, 200);
    anchor = Anchor.bottomCenter;

    // 6. ?덉씠???꾩튂: 諛곌꼍(-1) 蹂대떎???ш퀬, 留됰?湲?0) 蹂대떎???묎쾶 (留됰?湲??ㅻ줈!)
    priority = -1;
  }

  @override
  void update(double dt) {
    super.update(dt);
    if (isAttacking) return;

    _timer += dt;
    // 3~7珥??ъ씠 ?쒕뜡 ?湲????寃?留됰?湲?臾쇱깋
    if (_timer > 3 + _rnd.nextInt(4)) {
      _timer = 0;
      _chooseTargetAndAttack();
    }
  }

  void _chooseTargetAndAttack() {
    final targetPoles = game.children.whereType<Pole>().toList();
    if (targetPoles.isEmpty) return;

    isAttacking = true;
    _hasPlayedSound = false; // [異붽?] ?덈줈??怨듦꺽 ?쒖옉 ???ъ슫???뚮옒洹??뺤떎??珥덇린??
    _targetPole = targetPoles[_rnd.nextInt(targetPoles.length)];

    // ???留됰?湲??ㅻ줈 ?대룞
    add(MoveEffect.to(
      Vector2(_targetPole!.position.x, game.size.y),
      EffectController(duration: 1.5),
      onComplete: () => _startShaking(),
    ));
  }

  // [?섏젙] ?좊땲硫붿씠?섏쓣 誘몃━ 遺덈윭?붿쑝誘濡?async, await ?쒓굅 (利됱떆 ?ㅽ뻾)
  void _startShaking() {
    if (_targetPole == null) return;

    // 1. 怨듦꺽 ?좊땲硫붿씠?섏쑝濡?利됯컖 援먯껜 (?쒕젅???놁쓬)
    animation = _shakeAnimation;

    // 2. ?붾뱾湲??쒖옉????????踰덈쭔 ?뚮━ ?ъ깮
    if (!_hasPlayedSound) {
      SoundManager.playMonkeySfx();
      _hasPlayedSound = true; // ?ъ깮?덈떎怨??쒖떆
    }

    _targetPole!.isShakenByMonkey = true;
  }

  // ?좎?媛 ??쒖뿉 ?깃났?덉쓣 ??PlateSpinGame?먯꽌 ?몄텧?댁쨪 ?⑥닔
  // [?섏젙] async ?쒓굅 諛?留됰?湲??곹깭 蹂듦뎄 濡쒖쭅 異붽?
  void onDefeated() {
    _hasPlayedSound = false;

    if (_targetPole != null) {
      _targetPole!.isShakenByMonkey = false;
    }

    // [以묒슂 異붽?] ?먯댂???댁튂 ???ъ슫??媛뺤젣 醫낅즺!
    // SoundManager???④낵?뚯쓣 ?뺤??섎뒗 ?⑥닔媛 ?덈떎硫??몄텧??二쇱꽭??
    SoundManager.stopMonkeySfx(); // <-- (二쇱쓽: ???⑥닔 ?대쫫? SoundManager 援ы쁽??留욎떠???⑸땲??

    animation = _exitAnimation;

    add(MoveEffect.to(
        Vector2(-250, game.size.y),
        EffectController(duration: 1.5),
        onComplete: () {
          isAttacking = false;
          _resetToRoaming();
        }
    ));
  }

  // [?섏젙] async ?쒓굅 (誘몃━ 濡쒕뱶??湲곕낯 ?좊땲硫붿씠?섏쑝濡?利됱떆 蹂듦뎄)
  void _resetToRoaming() {
    animation = _roamingAnimation;
    _timer = 0; // ?湲??쒓컙 珥덇린??
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\plate.dart
==================================================

import 'dart:math';
import 'dart:ui' as ui;
import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'package:flame/game.dart';
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../sound_manager.dart';
import 'pole.dart';
import '../plate_game.dart';

class Plate extends SpriteComponent with HasGameReference<PlateSpinGame> {
  double omega;
  double angleRad = 0;
  double tilt = 0;
  double phase = 0;
  double currentAmp = 0,
      targetAmp = 0;

  // ?뵦 ?ㅻ쪟 ?닿껐 1: final 蹂?섎뒗 ?좎뼵 ???뱀? ?대땲?쒕씪?댁??먯꽌 珥덇린?뷀빐???⑸땲??
  final double phaseOffset = Random().nextDouble() * 2 * pi;

  double flatTimer = 0.0;
  bool gameOver = false;
  bool flyingAway = false;
  bool falling = false;
  double heat = 0.0;

  // 臾쇱꽦移?
  double friction;
  double omegaMax;
  double maxTilt;
  double fallSpeed;

  // ?뵦 ?ㅻ쪟 ?닿껐 2 & 3: 湲곕낯媛믪쓣 吏곸젒 ?좊떦?섏뿬 珥덇린???꾨씫 諛⑹?
  double omegaMin = 0.5;
  double flySpeedY = -300;
  double flySpeedX = 150;

  final String imagePath;

  Plate({
    required Vector2 center,
    required this.imagePath,
    double initialOmega = 15,
    this.friction = 1.0,
    this.omegaMax = 30,
    this.maxTilt = 0.8,
    this.fallSpeed = 600,
    Vector2? plateSize,
  })
      : omega = initialOmega,
        super(
        size: plateSize ?? Vector2(160, 160),
        anchor: Anchor.center,
        position: center,
        priority: 10,
      );


  @override
  Future<void> onLoad() async {
    await super.onLoad();
    sprite = await game.loadSprite(imagePath);
  }

  @override
  void onMount() {
    super.onMount();
    phase = phaseOffset;
  }

  void boost(double input) {
    if (gameOver || flyingAway || falling) return;
    // 遺?ㅽ듃 ?쒖뿉??omegaMax瑜??섏쑝硫?利됱떆 鍮꾪뻾 以鍮?
    omega += input * 0.02;
    // ?덈Т 臾댄븳???щ씪媛??寃껊쭔 諛⑹? (?? 理쒕? 50)
    if (omega > 50) omega = 50;
  }


  @override
  void update(double dt) {
    super.update(dt);
    if (gameOver) return;

    // 1. [?먯댂??諛⑹뼱] ?먯댂??怨듦꺽 媛먯? 諛?怨쇳쉶???좊룄
    // (???꾩튂? X醫뚰몴媛 嫄곗쓽 ?쇱튂?섎뒗 留됰?湲곕? 李얠쓬)
    try {
      final myPole = game.children
          .whereType<Pole>()
          .firstWhere((p) => (p.position.x - position.x).abs() < 1.0);

      if (myPole.isShakenByMonkey) {
        // ?먯댂?닿? ?붾뱾硫??뚯쟾 ?띾룄瑜?鍮좊Ⅴ寃?利앷??쒗궡 (怨쇱뿴 ?좊룄)
        omega += 8.0 * dt;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      // ?뱀떆 留됰?湲곕? 紐?李얜뜑?쇰룄 寃뚯엫??硫덉텛吏 ?딄쾶 ?덉쇅 泥섎━
    }

    // 2. [臾쇰━ 濡쒖쭅] 留덉같?μ뿉 ?섑븳 ?뚯쟾??媛먯뇿
    omega -= friction * dt;

    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    // 3. [?곹깭 ?곗텧 1] ?대? ?좎븘媛怨??덈뒗 以묒씠?쇰㈃?
    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    if (flyingAway) {
      position.y += flySpeedY * dt;
      position.x += flySpeedX * dt;
      angle += dt * 10;

      // ?붾㈃ ?꾨줈 ?꾩쟾???щ씪吏硫?寃뚯엫?ㅻ쾭 泥섎━ (硫붾え由??뺣━??
      if (position.y + size.y < 0) gameOver = true;
      return; // 鍮꾪뻾 以묒뿉???꾨옒 濡쒖쭅(?⑥뼱吏??먯젙 ?? 臾댁떆
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    // 4. [?곹깭 媛먯? 1] 異붾씫 ?먯젙 (?띾룄媛 ?덈Т ?먮┫ ??
    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    if (!falling && !flyingAway && omega <= 3.0) {
      falling = true;
      SoundManager.playSfxSafe("crash.wav");

      // [以묒슂] 寃뚯엫 蹂몄껜??"?⑥뼱議뚮떎"怨??뚮┝ (Tip: ?⑥뼱吏?硫섑듃 異쒕젰)
      game.failAndRespawnOrGameOver(fromFly: false);
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    // 5. [?곹깭 ?곗텧 2] ?대? ?⑥뼱吏怨??덈뒗 以묒씠?쇰㈃?
    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    if (falling) {
      position.y += (fallSpeed + 900) * dt;
      // ?⑥뼱吏???90?꾨줈 爰얠씠???곗텧
      angle = ui.lerpDouble(angle, (tilt >= 0 ? 1.57 : -1.57), dt * 25)!;

      // ?붾㈃ ?꾨옒濡??꾩쟾???щ씪吏硫?寃뚯엫?ㅻ쾭 泥섎━
      if (position.y > game.size.y + 100) gameOver = true;
      return; // 異붾씫 以묒뿉???꾨옒 濡쒖쭅 臾댁떆
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    // 6. [?쒓컖???곗텧] ?뚯쟾, ?붾뱾由? 湲곗슱湲?怨꾩궛
    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    angleRad = (angleRad + omega * dt) % (pi * 2);

    // ?띾룄???곕Ⅸ ?붾뱾由?吏꾪룺 怨꾩궛 (3~12 援ш컙)
    targetAmp = (1 - (omega - 3.0) / (12.0 - 3.0)).clamp(0, 1) * maxTilt;
    currentAmp = ui.lerpDouble(currentAmp, targetAmp, dt * 2.0)!;

    // ?붾뱾由?二쇨린
    phase += (0.5 + (omega * 0.3)) * dt;
    tilt = sin(phase) * currentAmp;
    angle = tilt; // ?ㅼ젣 而댄룷?뚰듃 ?뚯쟾 ?곸슜

    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    // 7. [?곹깭 媛먯? 2] 鍮꾪뻾(Fly) ?먯젙 (?띾룄媛 ?덈Т 鍮좊Ⅴ怨??섑룊????
    // ---------------------------------------------------------
    if (omega >= (omegaMax - 0.5)) {
      // 湲곗슱湲곌? 嫄곗쓽 ?섑룊(0.1 誘몃쭔)???뚮쭔 移댁슫??
      if (tilt.abs() < 0.1) {
        flatTimer += dt;

        // 1珥??댁긽 ?좎? ??諛쒖궗!
        if (flatTimer >= 1.0) {
          flyingAway = true;
          SoundManager.playSfxSafe("fly.wav");

          // ?쇄뼹??[?듭떖 ?섏젙] ?쇄뼹??
          // "?닿굔 ?좎븘媛??寃곷땲??" ?섍퀬 寃뚯엫 蹂몄껜???뚮┝ (Tip: ?좎븘媛?硫섑듃 異쒕젰)
          game.failAndRespawnOrGameOver(fromFly: true);
          // ?꿎뼯?꿎뼯?꿎뼯?꿎뼯?꿎뼯?꿎뼯?꿎뼯
        }
      } else {
        flatTimer = 0; // 湲곗슱?댁?硫???대㉧ 由ъ뀑
      }
    } else {
      flatTimer = 0; // ?띾룄媛 以꾨㈃ ??대㉧ 由ъ뀑
    }

    // 8. 怨쇱뿴 ?쒓컖??(鍮④컻吏???④낵)
    final targetHeat = ((omega - 25.0) / (omegaMax - 25.0)).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
    heat = ui.lerpDouble(heat, targetHeat, dt * 3.0)!;
  }

  @override
  void render(ui. Canvas canvas) {
    canvas.save();
    canvas.translate(size.x / 2, size.y / 2);

    // ?섏껌嫄곕━??湲곗슱湲??곸슜
    canvas.rotate(tilt);

    // ???쇰컲 ?묒떆??湲곕낯 ?⑹옉??(0.35)
    // BowlPlate??bowl.dart?먯꽌 0.6?쇰줈 吏곸젒 ??뼱?곕룄濡??좊룄?⑸땲??
    canvas.scale(1.0, 0.35);

    // ?섑룊 ?뚯쟾
    canvas.rotate(angleRad);

    sprite?.render(canvas, size: size, anchor: Anchor.center);

    // 怨쇱뿴 ?④낵
    if (heat > 0.05) {
      final overlay = Paint()
        ..color = Colors.red.withValues(alpha: heat * 0.7)
        ..maskFilter = MaskFilter.blur(BlurStyle.normal, 20 * heat);
      canvas.drawCircle(Offset.zero, size.x / 2, overlay);
    }
    canvas.restore();
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\components\pole.dart
==================================================

// lib/components/pole.dart
import 'package:flame/components.dart';
import 'package:flame/game.dart';

class Pole extends SpriteComponent with HasGameReference<FlameGame> {
  final double targetHeight;
  bool isShakenByMonkey = false; // ?먯댂?닿? ?붾뱾怨??덈뒗吏 ?щ? [?덈줈 異붽?]
  double resistanceAmount = 0; // ?ъ슜?먭? ?꾨Ⅴ怨??덈뒗 ??(???컪) [?덈줈 異붽?]

  Pole({
    required Vector2 position,
    required this.targetHeight,
  }) : super(
    position: position,
    size: Vector2(25, targetHeight), // ?앹꽦 ???먭퍡 ?ㅼ젙
    anchor: Anchor.bottomCenter,
    priority: 5,
  );

  @override
  Future<void> onLoad() async {
    await super.onLoad();
    sprite = await game.loadSprite('components/pole.png');

    // ??媛濡??먭퍡瑜?45px濡??뺤떎???볧삍?듬땲??
    size = Vector2(45, targetHeight);
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\widgets\age_rating_banner.dart
==================================================

import 'dart:async';
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

class AgeRatingBanner extends StatefulWidget {
  const AgeRatingBanner({super.key});

  @override
  State<AgeRatingBanner> createState() => _AgeRatingBannerState();
}

class _AgeRatingBannerState extends State<AgeRatingBanner> {
  bool _visible = true;

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    // 3珥??ㅼ뿉 ?щ씪吏?꾨줉 ??대㉧
    Timer(const Duration(seconds: 3), () {
      if (mounted) setState(() => _visible = false);
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return AnimatedOpacity(
      duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 600),
      opacity: _visible ? 1.0 : 0.0,
      child: Align(
        alignment: Alignment.topRight,
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 18, right: 18),
          child: Image.asset(
            'assets/images/rating_all.png',
            width: 80,
            height: 80,
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\widgets\exit_dialog.dart
==================================================

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

Future<void> showExitDialog(BuildContext context) async {
  return showDialog<void>(
    context: context,
    barrierDismissible: false,
    builder: (BuildContext context) {
      return AlertDialog(
        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
        backgroundColor: Colors.white,
        title: const Text(
          'SpinGo瑜?醫낅즺?좉퉴??',
          style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold),
        ),
        actionsAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
        actions: <Widget>[
          TextButton(
            onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(),
            child: const Text('痍⑥냼', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.grey)),
          ),
          ElevatedButton(
            style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
              backgroundColor: Color(0xFFF97316), // 釉뚮옖??而щ윭
              shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
            ),
            onPressed: () {
              Navigator.of(context).pop(); // ?ㅼ씠?쇰줈洹??リ린
              Navigator.of(context).maybePop(); // ?붾㈃ 醫낅즺
            },
            child: const Text('醫낅즺?섍린', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white)),
          ),
        ],
      );
    },
  );
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\intro.dart
==================================================

import 'dart:async';
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'sound_manager.dart';
import 'language_manager.dart';
import 'l10n.dart';
import '../widgets/age_rating_banner.dart';

class IntroPage extends StatefulWidget {
  // 狩?紐⑤뱶 踰덊샇瑜??꾨떖?????덈룄濡?肄쒕갚 ?⑥닔 ?섏젙 (0: ?쇰컲, 1: ?좊굹?? 2: ?대Ⅴ??
  final Function(int) onStartGame;

  const IntroPage({super.key, required this.onStartGame});

  @override
  State<IntroPage> createState() => _IntroPageState();
}

class _IntroPageState extends State<IntroPage> {
  int _index = 0;
  String _typedText = "";
  Timer? _typingTimer;
  bool _showModeSelection = false; // 狩?紐⑤뱶 ?좏깮李??쒖떆 ?щ?

  List<Map<String, String>> get _slides =>
      [
        {"image": "assets/images/intro1.png", "text": L10n.tr('intro1')},
        {"image": "assets/images/intro2.png", "text": L10n.tr('intro2')},
        {"image": "assets/images/intro3.png", "text": L10n.tr('intro3')},
        {"image": "assets/images/intro4.png", "text": L10n.tr('intro4')},
        {"image": "assets/images/intro5.png", "text": L10n.tr('intro5')},
      ];

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    SoundManager.requestWelcomeLoop();
    _startTyping();
  }

  void _startTyping() {
    _typingTimer?.cancel();
    setState(() => _typedText = "");
    final fullText = _slides[_index]["text"]!;
    int charIndex = 0;
    _typingTimer = Timer.periodic(const Duration(milliseconds: 60), (t) {
      if (charIndex < fullText.length) {
        setState(() {
          _typedText += fullText[charIndex];
        });
        charIndex++;
      } else {
        t.cancel();
      }
    });
  }

  void _nextSlide() {
    if (_index < _slides.length - 1) {
      setState(() {
        _index++;
      });
      _startTyping();
    } else {
      // 狩?留덉?留??щ씪?대뱶 ?댄썑 ?좏깮李쎌쓣 蹂댁뿬以띾땲??
      setState(() => _showModeSelection = true);
    }
  }

  @override
  void dispose() {
    _typingTimer?.cancel();
    super.dispose();
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final slide = _slides[_index];
    return Scaffold(
      backgroundColor: Colors.black,
      body: Stack(
        children: [
          Positioned(
            top: 24,
            right: 24,
            child: ElevatedButton(
              style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                backgroundColor: Colors.black54,
                padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 18, vertical: 10),
              ),
              onPressed: () async {
                final next = LanguageManager.current.value == AppLang.ko
                    ? AppLang.en
                    : AppLang.ko;

                await LanguageManager.set(next);

                if (!mounted) return;
                setState(() {
                  _typedText = "";
                });
                _startTyping();
              },
              child: Text(
                LanguageManager.current.value == AppLang.ko ? 'EN' : 'KR',
                style: const TextStyle(
                  color: Colors.white,
                  fontSize: 18,
                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                ),
              ),
            ),
          ),
          // 諛곌꼍 ?대?吏
          Positioned.fill(
              child: Image.asset(slide["image"]!, fit: BoxFit.cover)),

          // ?띿뒪???곸뿭 (紐⑤뱶 ?좏깮李쎌씠 ?꾨땺 ?뚮쭔 ?쒖떆)
          if (!_showModeSelection)
            Positioned(
              left: MediaQuery
                  .of(context)
                  .size
                  .width * 0.25,
              bottom: 120,
              right: 30,
              child: Text(_typedText,
                  style: const TextStyle(
                    color: Colors.white,
                    fontSize: 25,
                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                  )),
            ),

          // ?ㅼ쓬 ?붿궡??(紐⑤뱶 ?좏깮李쎌씠 ?꾨땺 ?뚮쭔 ?쒖떆)
          if (!_showModeSelection)
            Positioned(
              right: 70,
              top: MediaQuery
                  .of(context)
                  .size
                  .height / 2 - 40,
              child: GestureDetector(
                onTap: _nextSlide,
                child: const Text('>',
                    style: TextStyle(
                        color: Colors.white,
                        fontSize: 72,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                        shadows: [
                          Shadow(
                              offset: Offset(2, 2),
                              blurRadius: 5.0,
                              color: Colors.black54),
                        ])),
              ),
            ),

          // 狩?紐⑤뱶 ?좏깮 ?ㅻ쾭?덉씠
          if (_showModeSelection)
            Container(
              color: Colors.black.withOpacity(0.8),
              child: Center(
                child: Column(
                  mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
                  children: [
                    _buildModeButton(
                      context,
                      title: 'Beginner',
                      desc: '0?④퀎遺???섎굹??,
                      mode: 0,
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 24),
                    _buildModeButton(
                      context,
                      title: 'Expert',
                      desc: '湲곕줉???꾪븳 ?꾩쟾',
                      mode: 1,
                      color: Colors.orangeAccent,
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(height: 24),
                    _buildModeButton(
                      context,
                      title: 'Brain Booster',
                      desc: '???먭레 紐⑤뱶',
                      mode: 2,
                      color: Colors.greenAccent,
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ),
            ),

          // ?섎떒 嫄대꼫?곌린 踰꾪듉 (?щ씪?대뱶 以묒뿉留??쒖떆)
          if (!_showModeSelection)
            Align(
              alignment: Alignment.bottomCenter,
              child: Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 40),
                child: ElevatedButton(
                  onPressed: () => setState(() => _showModeSelection = true),
                  style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      backgroundColor: Colors.black54,
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
                          horizontal: 30, vertical: 14)),
                  child: Text(L10n.tr('skip'),
                      style:
                      const TextStyle(fontSize: 22, color: Colors.white)),
                ),
              ),
            ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }

  // 紐⑤뱶 ?좏깮 踰꾪듉 ?꾩젽
  Widget _buildModeButton(BuildContext context,
      {required String title,
        required String desc,
        required int mode,
        Color color = Colors.amberAccent}) {
    return InkWell(
      onTap: () => widget.onStartGame(mode),
      child: Container(
        width: 400,
        padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 20, horizontal: 24),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          border: Border.all(color: color, width: 2),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(15),
          color: Colors.black87,
        ),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            Text(title,
                style: TextStyle(
                    fontSize: 26, color: color, fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),
            const SizedBox(height: 8),
            Text(desc,
                style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 16, color: Colors.white70)),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\l10n.dart
==================================================

    'tip_fall_1': 'Eyes on the plate!',

    'tip_fall_3': 'Don?셳 relax?봯lates fall when you least expect.',
    'tip_fall_4': 'Move it, before a fly lands on it!',

    // ?먯댂???ㅽ뙣 硫붿떆吏 (English)
    'tip_monkey_1': 'Don\'t let the monkey run wild!',
    'tip_monkey_2': 'Hold on tight to the pole!',
    'tip_monkey_3': 'Grab the pole to slow it down!',
    'tip_monkey_4': 'Don\'t let the monkey beat you!',

    'event1_girl': 'Congratulations on becoming a regular member!',
    'event2_man': 'How about a drink to celebrate...',
    'event2_monkey': 'I can?셳 let a guy like that take her away!',
    'finale_man': 'Maybe one son and one daughter...',
    'finale_girl': 'That\'s a bit much...',
  };

  static String tr(String key) {
    final lang = LanguageManager.current.value;
    final map = lang == AppLang.en ? _en : _ko;
    return map[key] ?? _ko[key] ?? key;
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\language_manager.dart
==================================================

import 'package:shared_preferences/shared_preferences.dart';
import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

enum AppLang { ko, en }

class LanguageManager {
  static const _key = 'app_language';
  static final ValueNotifier<AppLang> current = ValueNotifier<AppLang>(
      AppLang.ko);

  static Future<void> init() async {
    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
    final code = prefs.getString(_key);
    if (code == 'en') {
      current.value = AppLang.en;
    } else {
      current.value = AppLang.ko;
    }
  }

  static Future<void> set(AppLang lang) async {
    current.value = lang;
    final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
    await prefs.setString(_key, lang == AppLang.en ? 'en' : 'ko');
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: C:\Users\parki\spingo_expansion\lib\levels.dart
==================================================

enum PlateType { normal, tray, bowl }

class PlateSet {
  final PlateType type;

  PlateSet(this.type);
}

// ???먮윭 ?닿껐: TransformSet ?대옒?ㅺ? ?놁뼱??諛쒖깮???먮윭瑜??꾪빐 異붽?
class TransformSet {
  final PlateType to;

  TransformSet(this.to);
}

class Level {
  final int index;
  final Duration duration;
  final String background;
  final String messageKey;
  final List<PlateSet> sets;

  // ???먮윭 ?닿껐: ?뺤쓽?섏? ?딆븯??留ㅺ컻蹂?섎뱾??異붽?
  final bool isVariation;
  final List<TransformSet> transforms;
  final bool showEventScene; // [異붽?] ?대깽????異쒕젰 ?щ?

  Level({
    required this.index,
    required this.duration,
    required this.background,
    required this.messageKey,
    required this.sets,
    this.isVariation = false, // 湲곕낯媛??ㅼ젙
    this.transforms = const [], // 湲곕낯媛??ㅼ젙
    this.showEventScene = false, // [異붽?] 湲곕낯媛믪? false濡??ㅼ젙
  });
}

final List<Level> beginnerLevels = [
  Level(
    index: 1,
    duration: const Duration(seconds: 30),
    background: "backimage1.png",
    messageKey: "lv1_msg",
    sets: [
      PlateSet(PlateType.normal),
      PlateSet(PlateType.normal),
      PlateSet(PlateType.normal)
    ],
  ),
  Level(
    index: 1,
    duration: const Duration(seconds: 30),

      PlateSet(PlateType.normal),
